subject: Rebase PR #18 (agent-5-clean/shell design system) onto updated main and verify build
description:
REQUEST_ID: merge-all-open-prs
DOMAIN: shell
ASSIGNED_TO: worker-5
FILES: src/index.css, src/components/Window.css, src/components/MenuBar.css, src/components/SettingsPanel.css, src/components/SettingsPanel.jsx, src/components/WindowManager.jsx, src/components/MarketViewer.css, src/components/PopoutWindow.jsx, src/components/Shell.jsx
VALIDATION: tier2
TIER: 3
PRIORITY: URGENT

## Task: Rebase agent-5-clean branch (PR #18) onto main

PR #18 contains the CSS design system overhaul (WCAG AA tokens) and WindowManager cleanup. PR #16 (agent-5) was already closed as superseded. Main has moved forward — rebase agent-5-clean onto current main.

## Steps

```bash
# 1. Checkout agent-5-clean
git fetch origin
git checkout agent-5-clean 2>/dev/null || git checkout -b agent-5-clean origin/agent-5-clean

# 2. Rebase onto main
git rebase origin/main
```

## If Conflicts Arise

**IMPORTANT about --ours/--theirs during rebase:**
During `git rebase`, the naming is REVERSED:
- `--ours` = main (the base you're rebasing onto)
- `--theirs` = your commits being replayed

Conflict resolution rules:
- `src/index.css`: KEEP YOUR version (design tokens go here)
  `git checkout --theirs src/index.css`
- `src/components/Window.css`, `MenuBar.css`, `SettingsPanel.css`, `SettingsPanel.jsx`, `PopoutWindow.jsx`: KEEP YOUR version
  `git checkout --theirs <file>`
- `src/components/WindowManager.jsx`, `Shell.jsx`: KEEP YOUR version (cleanup work)
  `git checkout --theirs <file>`
- `src/components/MarketViewer.css`: KEEP YOUR version (uses design tokens)
  `git checkout --theirs src/components/MarketViewer.css`
- `src/components/scanners/` files (LiveScanner.css, HistoricalScanner.css, LiveScanner.jsx, HistoricalScanner.jsx):
  KEEP MAIN's version — these were already properly handled by agent-4 (PR #14, already merged)
  `git checkout --ours src/components/scanners/`
- `src/services/mockData.js`: KEEP MAIN's version
  `git checkout --ours src/services/mockData.js`
- `dist/` files: REMOVE THEM
  `git rm -rf dist/ 2>/dev/null || true`
- `.claude/` files: KEEP MAIN's version
  `git checkout --ours .claude/`
- `docs/specs/historical-scanner.md`: Keep if present, harmless

After resolving each file: `git add <file>` then `git rebase --continue`

## After Rebase

```bash
# Force push rebased branch
git push --force-with-lease origin agent-5-clean

# Build verification
npm install && npm run build
```

If build fails, check for missing imports or CSS variable references.

## Completion

1. Update worker-status.json: status = 'completed_task', current_task = null
2. Append to change-summaries.md: note PR #18 (agent-5-clean) rebased, ready to merge
3. Touch .claude/signals/.completion-signal
